title: Live Jazz Sunday
description: Live jazz trio in the garden from 2PM. Special cocktail menu. Booking essential.

title: Coffee Tasting Workshop
description: Learn to taste coffee like a pro. Covers origins, roasting, and brewing. Includes 250g bag.

title: Valentine's Dinner — Garden Edition
description: Five-course candlelit dinner under the stars. Live acoustic guitar. Limited to 20 couples.
